name: Spotify Premium Student
description: ₹59/month for students — 50% off regular premium. Stream ad-free music, download offline, and get Hulu (in select regions).
eligibility: Must be enrolled at an accredited college/university. Verified via SheerID.

name: YouTube Premium Student
description: ₹79/month student plan with ad-free videos, YouTube Music, background play, and offline downloads.
eligibility: Full-time student at accredited higher education institution in India.

name: Apple Education Store
description: Save up to ₹15,000 on Mac and ₹5,000 on iPad. Free AirPods with qualifying Mac or iPad for education.
eligibility: Currently enrolled or accepted students and educators at any level.

name: Adobe Creative Cloud Student
description: Get all 20+ creative apps (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, etc.) at 60-70% discount — ~₹1,596/month for first year.
eligibility: Students aged 13+ enrolled at accredited institution. Must provide proof of enrollment.

name: GitHub Student Developer Pack
description: Free access to 100+ premium developer tools: GitHub Pro, JetBrains IDEs, Canva Pro, DigitalOcean credits, Azure credits, and more.
eligibility: Currently enrolled student at accredited school with valid student ID or enrollment document.

name: Samsung Student Advantage
description: Extra 10% student discount on Galaxy smartphones, tablets, laptops, and wearables on Samsung India store.
eligibility: College students with valid student email or ID.

name: Microsoft 365 Education
description: Free Office 365 (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OneNote, Teams) with 1TB OneDrive for students at eligible institutions.
eligibility: Student or educator at eligible institution with valid school email address.

name: UNiDAYS Student Discounts
description: Exclusive 10-20% off at 800+ brands including Nike, Adidas, ASOS, Samsung, Apple, Ray-Ban, and more.
eligibility: University/college student verified through UNiDAYS platform.

name: Amazon Prime Student
description: Half-price Amazon Prime membership at ₹749/year — free delivery, Prime Video, Prime Music, and more.
eligibility: Must have a valid .edu email address or student ID from Indian college.

name: JetBrains All Products Pack (Student)
description: Free access to all JetBrains IDEs — IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, DataGrip, and more for learning.
eligibility: Student or teacher at accredited educational institution. Apply with university email.

name: Notion Education Plan
description: Free Notion Plus plan with unlimited blocks, file uploads, and advanced features for students & educators.
eligibility: Sign up with .edu email or provide proof of enrollment.

name: Canva Pro for Students
description: Free Canva Pro with premium templates, brand kits, Magic Resize, background remover, and 100GB storage.
eligibility: Students can get free Canva Pro through GitHub Student Developer Pack.

name: Coursera Campus / Student Plan
description: Access to 3,000+ courses from top universities. Many courses free to audit. Financial aid available for certificates.
eligibility: Anyone can audit courses for free. Financial aid available for certificate courses.

name: LinkedIn Learning (via University)
description: Free access to 16,000+ courses on business, tech, and creative skills through participating universities.
eligibility: Student at a participating university. Check with your institution's library.

name: Swiggy Student Discount
description: Student offers on food delivery — periodic cashback deals, flat discounts on first orders, and free delivery promos.
eligibility: Students near college campus areas. Offers vary by location and time.

name: Zomato Student Offers
description: Special student meal deals, Zomato Gold at discounted rates, and exclusive campus delivery offers.
eligibility: College students with valid student ID. Some offers limited to campus areas.

name: IRCTC Student Concession
description: Students get concession on train fares — up to 75% off sleeper class for school students, 25% for college students.
eligibility: Bonafide student with concession certificate from institution. Present during travel.

name: AWS Educate & Academy
description: Free cloud computing credits ($100), hands-on labs, learning pathways, and career resources for students.
eligibility: Student at an eligible institution. Apply through AWS Educate portal.

name: Google Cloud Student Credits
description: Free Google Cloud credits through Google for Education or Qwiklabs. Access to Cloud Shell, BigQuery, and more.
eligibility: Student with valid .edu email or through participating institution.

name: Microsoft Azure for Students
description: Free $100 Azure credit + 25 free services for 12 months. Access Virtual Machines, Databases, AI, and more.
eligibility: Student aged 18+ at accredited institution. Verified through academic email.

name: Figma Education Plan
description: Free Figma Professional plan for students and educators with unlimited files and full feature access.
eligibility: Current student or educator at accredited institution. Verify with school email.

name: Autodesk Education License
description: Free 1-year license for AutoCAD, Revit, Maya, 3ds Max, Fusion 360, and all Autodesk products for education.
eligibility: Students and educators at accredited institutions. Renewable annually.

name: Grammarly Premium Student Discount
description: Get Grammarly Premium with advanced grammar, plagiarism detection, and tone analysis at student pricing.
eligibility: Students at participating universities may get institutional access. Otherwise, individual student discount.

name: 1Password Student Plan
description: Free 1Password for 6 months through student developer packs. Secure password management for all devices.
eligibility: Via GitHub Student Developer Pack. Must be verified student.

name: Headspace Student Plan
description: Meditation and mindfulness app at 85% off for students — access all guided meditations, sleep, and focus exercises.
eligibility: Currently enrolled student at an accredited college/university. Verified via SheerID.
